description: Use this API to specify or return the option to enable or disable the line shunt reporting. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = line_shunt_reporting(ival) ierr, ival = line_shunt_reporting()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 0 by default; else output).

ival.description: no special reporting of line shunts in POUT, LOUT and LAMP.
include special reporting of line shunts in POUT, LOUT and LAMP.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
